role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and language (English) on the poster, staying within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed vegetation density, road type, and climate cues without drifting into regulatory details.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Musa (banana) and canopy types, correctly limiting claims to general biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the political poster as a regulatory/election artifact and road construction standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized vehicle types (pickup, underbone) and infrastructure (tarp shelters) as cultural markers.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the Philippines as the primary candidate. The tournament logic correctly prioritized the unique political poster evidence to distinguish the Philippines from the closest analog (Indonesia).

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified English text and Latin script.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described lush tropical vegetation and rural concrete road.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana plants and dense canopy.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly cited the 'Vote 8' poster and road width.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the white pickup and underbone motorcycle.
